skills.desc: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by <nobr>#1[i]%</nobr>. If <nobr>#2[i]</nobr> or more Skill Points are consumed in the same turn, additionally increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by <nobr>#3[i]%</nobr>, lasting for <nobr>#4[i]</nobr> turns.

5.name: Livestream's Protean Vistas
5.miniLore: The Planar Sphere encapsulates countless streaming windows in its digital space. It's a virtual society deeply interwoven with reality, a fantastical yet detached imaginary metropolis, an alternate life that anyone can peek into and participate within.
5.lore:
[...logging in...]

riddle posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:16
■ It's Hanami's birthday stream today, but why does it feel like we just celebrated it last month?

I'm on Fire! posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:18
■ She claims her birthday is on August 73rd... Try finding THAT on a calendar!

Voice of 873 posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:20
■ Hanami updated her status: "Wow! So many gifts! Thank you everyone! Also, if possible, please help clear out Hanami's wishlist~ Love ya ♥"

riddle posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:21
■ I know she's trying to drain my wallet dry! But you know what? I'm totally cool with it~ My dear Hanami~ My precious Hanami~

[Replying to riddle] KappaKami posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:26
■ You're that person who was just online, aren't you? All those gifts you're sending, you're just trying to make yourself into a top fan, right? Our Hanami already has her own fanbase, so stop trying to force your way in.
■ You think I can't look up your ID? You're a lawless thug, a criminal. You think I don't know that?
■ You're pretending to be a Hanami fan like us, but you're really just trying to build up a fanbase to cash in on her popularity and trending status. Get out of the stream!

[Replying to KappaKami] riddle posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:41
■ Who are you to talk? What's it to you? At least I showed up for the livestream. What have YOU been doing?

I'm on Fire! posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 02:45
■ ...Are there only Hanami stans in this forum? No haters around? If you're a fan, head straight to the livestream channel!

[Replying to I'm on Fire!] \(^o^)/~ posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 03:00
■ I'm a hardcore anti-fan!
■ We need to make a plan to really mess with her and her fans. Not just get her canceled, but get her arrested!
■ I've DMed you the group chat link ♥

[Replying to \(^o^)/~] I'm on Fire! posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 03:02
■ I've joined several anti-fan groups. We act like bros normally, but the moment something happens, they bicker internally. Heh, I'm done with this.

Voice of 873 posted on Aug 7 (Fri) 03:03
■ Hanami updated her status: "Nami-nami, nighty-niiiight"

[...logging off.]

As the night draws to an end, digital nomads in cyberspace peer around curiously, exchanging fragmented discussions and offering ambiguous stances. Ultimately, none will be remembered...

Virtual characters celebrate virtual birthdays, as virtual chaos seeps into chaotic reality.

6.name: Livestream's Chatter Banter
6.miniLore: The Tengoku@Livestream might not be heaven. The countless messages flooding the chat windows can build glory or bring destruction, as it was never an isolation from reality, but rather an extension of it.
6.lore:
[...logging in...]

HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:22
■ This is bad! That birthday livestream for Hanami was fake! I wasted my money for nothing! Everyone else got scammed too!

[Replying to HanamiLover4Life] Am I a God posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:24
■ From what I can gather: Earlier, a hacker uploaded a "RAM Sleep Command" to Hanami's livestream, secretly copying all of Hanami's private data to third-party cloud server nodes without her noticing.
■ In short, that night, Hanami spent the evening chatting with fake comments, while real viewers were interacting with pre-recorded stream content.
■ Today, Hanami discovered her money hadn't come through, and realized the hacker had made off with her streaming revenue from two days ago.

[Replying to Am I a God] Tech Guru posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:28
■ No way, none of the real-time comments showed up? Didn't Hanami notice that all the comments were fake?

Voice of 873 posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:33
■ Hanami updated her status: "Nami-nami, I'm so mad! ヽ(ｏ皿′ｏ)ﾉ I've called the police. This is financial fraaaud!"

[Replying to Tech Guru] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:36
■ Last time I sent her money, Hanami only said "Thanks for the Super Chat, HanamiLover4Life" and it's the same this time.
■ How was I supposed to know this was reusing the same response from last time!? I can't tell the difference! I really can't!
■ Besides, she always ignores non-paying chat messages... I just thought she wasn't paying attention to me.

I'm on Fire! posted on Aug 10 (Mon) 23:50
■ LMAO, what a cyber heist. Serves her right. Totally deserved.
■ So many people in the livestream pretending to chat normally, but no one dares to call it out. Everyone thinks that if others don't bring up the issue, then there's no issue.

[Replying to I'm on Fire!] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:01
■ I'm done. Never spending money on virtual streamers again.
■ She never really interacted with me, and I can't tell if she was ever sincere... I thought she would respond in real-time to my live comments, but now I see I was just fooling myself.

[Replying to HanamiLover4Life] Am I a God posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:15
■ Don't be so negative, bro.
■ Sure, you got scammed out of your money, but you were happy that day. Does it really matter if that Hanami was real or not?

Voice of 873 posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:17
■ Hanami updated her status: "Nami-nami, I can't sleep! Come hang out with me in my livestream~"

[Replying to Am I a God] HanamiLover4Life posted on Aug 11 (Tue) 00:18
■ You've got a point there, bro. I'm off to watch the stream.

[...logging off.]

The livestream countdown begins, as the viewer count climbs steadily. Digital wanderers with mixed emotions stir once again as another wild and sensational broadcast is about to begin...

True feelings mixed with true lies. Truth here ain't worth a dime.
